Pressetext: Hailing from the UK, Mark Broom has been one of the most consistent techno producers of the last 30 years. Discogs lists over 180 12-inch releases and a handful of albums, and it can be assumed that he has had a hand in almost 1,000 releases. It all started in the Second Summer of Love in 1989, when he was a teen on vacation in Tenerife and got hooked on the emerging sounds of Chicago and acid house.
